narrative:
Bowling Green Twp. township has 372 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 32.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 12.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 20.2 percentage points.
